description_long: This bonsai features a dense, bushy canopy of elongated, narrow leaves that cascade outward in all directions, creating a lush and voluminous silhouette. The foliage is dark green-brown, giving the tree a mature and natural appearance. The trunk is short and mostly obscured by the thick foliage, but it appears to be sturdy and slightly tapered, emerging from a small, faceted pot. The pot is dark in color, likely ceramic or plastic, and has a geometric, angular design with a matte finish. The overall structure of the bonsai is compact, with branches and leaves forming a rounded, almost spherical mass. This bonsai would be well-suited for display in urban parks, gardens, or as a decorative element on patios and balconies.
description: A lush, dense bonsai with cascading, narrow leaves and a dark, angular pot, forming a rounded, bushy silhouette. The foliage is thick and natural, giving the tree a mature, ornamental look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bonsai's dense, rounded canopy with leaves radiating outward and the faceted pot clearly visible at the base.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the cascading nature of the leaves, with some foliage hanging lower and partially obscuring the pot.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the thickest part of the foliage, with the trunk and pot mostly hidden by the dense leaves.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, but with slightly less visible pot and more emphasis on the rounded, bushy leaf mass.
attribute_pot_type: Small, faceted, angular pot with a geometric design, likely ceramic or plastic, dark in color, and matte in finish.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is short, sturdy, and mostly straight with minimal visible curvature, following a formal upright style.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are densely packed and radiate outward in all directions, forming a rounded, bushy silhouette with no clear tiering.
attribute_leaf_density: Dense; the foliage is thick and lush, with leaves covering nearly all visible branches and trunk.
